claims.subject: Fable 5
claims.object: 0% success rate on ALE's hardest tier

evidence.quote: Over the past many months, Berkeley RDI has been building Agents’ Last Exam (ALE) , a benchmark designed to test exactly that claim on real digital labor-market work.
On ALE’s hardest tier, every frontier agent we tested, including Fable 5, achieved a 0% success rate.
And if your agent only operates in the terminal, we’ve also released ALE-CLI , a CLI-only subset of the benchmark.

Alon co-founded NewCore with chief technology officer Amihai Neiderman (pictured above, right), a former Unit 8200 research leader and founder of healthcare AI startup Nym Health, and chief commercial officer Erez Yarkoni (pictured above, left), who previously served as CIO of T-Mobile USA and Telstra.

claims.subject: 月之暗面 Kimi
claims.object: Kimi K2.7 Code 模型高速版

claims.subject: Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版
claims.object: 1M tokens 的标准输入和输出价格分别为 13 元和 54 元；命中缓存的输入价格为 2.6 元

claims.subject: Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版
claims.object: 输出速度约为普通版的 5-6 倍，常规编程场景下（取输入长度中位数）输出速度约 180 Tokens/s ，短上下文场景可达 260 Tokens/s

evidence.quote: 月之暗面 Kimi 今日宣布， Kimi K2.7 Code 模型高速版上线，现已向 Kimi Code Beta 计划成员、Kimi API 开发者、Kimi Business 用户开放。
Kimi K2.7 Code 高速版价格为 Kimi K2.7 Code 的两倍： 1M tokens 的标准输入和输出价格分别为 13 元和 54 元；命中缓存的输入价格为 2.6 元 。
高速版与 Kimi K2.7 Code 是相同模型，输出速度约为普通版的 5-6 倍，常规编程场景下（取输入长度中位数）输出速度约 180 Tokens/s ，短上下文场景可达 260 Tokens/s 。
